title: Single Block Feature
description: Places a single block in the world. The block can be selected from a weighted list.

identifier.description: The identifier for this feature. The identifier must include a namespace and must match the filename.

oneOf.description: An array of weighted block options.

weight.description: Optional. Weight for random selection (relative to other blocks).

places_block.description: The block to place, or an array of weighted blocks to randomly select from.

enforce_survivability_rules.description: If true, enforce the block's built-in survivability rules.

enforce_placement_rules.description: If true, enforce the block's built-in placement rules.

may_attach_to.description: Optional. Allowlist of blocks this can attach to.

may_replace.description: Optional. Blocks that can be replaced during placement.

block_placement_rules.title: Block Placement Rules
block_placement_rules.description: Rules for which blocks this can attach to.

auto_rotate.description: Optional. If true, automatically rotate based on attached face.

min_sides_must_attach.description: Optional. Minimum number of sides that must have valid attachments.

north.description: Optional. Blocks allowed on the north face.

south.description: Optional. Blocks allowed on the south face.

east.description: Optional. Blocks allowed on the east face.

west.description: Optional. Blocks allowed on the west face.

top.description: Optional. Blocks allowed on the top face.

bottom.description: Optional. Blocks allowed on the bottom face.

sides.description: Optional. Blocks allowed on all horizontal faces.
